proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing 500 hours annually on proposal writing. Here's how it happens.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Drafting proposals manually drains time from Gmail's intuitive services. Automate it in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below highlights a significant and ongoing loss for Gmail.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposals is an hour not spent improving Gmail’s services. Time bleeds away with each manual draft.

problems.title: Opportunity Loss
problems.description: Gmail misses potential deals while stuck on manual proposal creation. This results in lost revenue and growth.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Proposals vary wildly, damaging Gmail’s brand. Inconsistent branding costs Gmail trust and credibility in the market.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual processes lead to errors. Every mistake in a proposal costs Gmail potential business and reputation.

problems.title: High Labor Cost
problems.description: Paying staff for tedious proposal tasks diverts resources. This costs Gmail thousands annually in unnecessary labor.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Falling behind competitors who automate proposals results in lost deals for Gmail. This disadvantage can cost the market lead.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system transforms all these issues into efficient, automated processes.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system creates them in 47 seconds, freeing Gmail's team to focus on service innovation.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Gmail's brand varies with each manual proposal. Our AI ensures every proposal is consistently branded and professional.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual drafts are prone to errors. Our system minimizes mistakes, preserving Gmail’s reputation and client trust.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs drain resources. Our system reduces labor expenses by automating repetitive tasks.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Gmail loses deals to faster competitors. With our system, they gain speed and efficiency, securing more business.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Revolutionize Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Intuitive Email Platform
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will transform your email experience, increase efficiency, and reduce spam with Gmail's advanced features.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every unengaged email is a missed opportunity for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Email Overload
problems.description: Employees waste an average of 30% of their day sorting through emails. This inefficiency costs time and productivity.

problems.title: High Spam Rates
problems.description: Acme Corp deals with a 20% spam rate, leading to potential data breaches and loss of sensitive information.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Current email storage caps at 5 GB per user, forcing Acme Corp to delete important communications and documents.

problems.title: Mobile Accessibility
problems.description: 30% of your team struggles with accessing emails on the go, impacting remote work efficiency.

problems.title: Security Concerns
problems.description: Without robust security features, Acme Corp risks losing $500,000 annually in potential security breaches.

problems.title: Collaboration Challenges
problems.description: Ineffective email collaboration tools lead to project delays, costing Acme Corp an estimated $200,000 each year in missed deadlines.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address Acme Corp's current communication losses.

solutions.title: Gmail's Spam Filtering
solutions.description: Reduce your spam rate by 90% with Gmail's advanced spam filtering, ensuring your team receives only crucial emails.

solutions.title: Mobile Access with Gmail
solutions.description: Empower your workforce with seamless mobile email access, boosting productivity for remote and on-the-go employees.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security Features
solutions.description: Protect your communications with Gmail's robust security measures, safeguarding sensitive company data.

solutions.title: 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: Increase email storage to 15 GB per user, allowing your team to retain critical communications and documents.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail offers intuitive, efficient, and secure email solutions.

whyUsCards.title: User-Friendly Interface
whyUsCards.description: Our platform is designed to be intuitive, making it easy for your team to adapt and thrive.

whyUsCards.title: Top-Notch Security
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your data security with industry-leading measures that protect your communications.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Gmail is trusted by millions worldwide for its reliability and efficiency.

whyUsCards.title: Dedicated Support
whyUsCards.description: Our support team is here to ensure you receive the help you need when you need it.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is committed to your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategies to enhance communication efficiency and build strong client relationships.

process.title: Initial Consultation
